debug_info.goal:
V : Type u_1
P : Type u_2
inst✝⁴ : NormedAddCommGroup V
inst✝³ : InnerProductSpace ℝ V
inst✝² : MetricSpace P
inst✝¹ : NormedAddTorsor V P
inst✝ : Fact (finrank ℝ V = 2)
⊢ ∃ c,
    0 < c ∧
      ∀ {n : ℕ},
        1 < n →
          ∀ {S : Finset P},
            S.card = n →
              ((↑S).Pairwise fun x y => 1 ≤ dist x y) →
                ∃ l,
                  finrank ℝ ↥l.direction = 1 ∧
                    (∃ p₁ p₂, p₁ ∈ S ∧ p₂ ∈ S ∧ l.SOppSide p₁ p₂) ∧ ∀ p ∈ S, c * ↑n ^ (-1 / 3) ≤ Metric.infDist p ↑l

          all_goals try { tauto }
      exact h8
    rcases h5 with ⟨p₂, hp₂, hp₂₁⟩
    use { carrier := {p : P | (p - (p₁ + p₂)/2) · (p₂ - p₁) = 0}, 
          direction := {v : V | v = (p₂ - p₁)}, 
          origin := (p₁ + p₂)/2, 
          isMin := by 
            simp [Finset.mem_erase, hp₂₁] 
          }
    constructor
    · -- Show that finrank ℝ l.direction = 1
      simp [Finset.mem_erase, hp₂₁]
      all_goals
        try { 
          tauto 
        }
    constructor
    · -- Show that there exists p₁ p₂ in S such that l.SOppSide p₁ p₂
      use p₁, p₂
      constructor
      · exact hp₁
      constructor
      · exact hp₂
      · -- Show that l.SOppSide p₁ p₂
        simp [Finset.mem_erase, hp₂₁]
        all_goals
          try { 
            tauto 
          }
    · -- Show that ∀ p ∈ S, c * (n : ℝ) ^ (-1 / 3 : ℝ) ≤ Metric.infDist p l
      intro p hp
      simp [Finset.mem_erase, hp₂₁]
      all_goals
        try { 
          tauto 
        }

norm_num

use 1 / 2
  constructor
  · -- Show c > 0
    norm_num
  · -- Show the property
    intro n hn S hS h_pair
    have h1 : S.Nonempty := by
      apply Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr
      by_contra h
      rw [h] at hS
      simp at hS
      all_goals linarith
    rcases h1 with ⟨p₁, hp₁⟩
    have h2 : S.card ≥ 2 := by
      have hn' : n ≥ 2 := by linarith
      have hS' : S.card = n := hS
      linarith
    have h3 : ∃ p₂ ∈ S, p₂ ≠ p₁ := by
      have h4 : S.card ≥ 2 := h2
      have h5 : p₁ ∈ S := hp₁
      have h6 : S.card > 1 := by linarith
      have h7 : ∃ p₂ ∈ S, p₂ ≠ p₁ := by
        have h8 : S.Nonempty := by
          use p₁
          all_goals tauto
        rcases h8 with ⟨p₂, hp₂⟩
        by_cases h_eq : p₂ = p₁
        · -- If p₂ = p₁, then we need another point
          exfalso
          have h9 : S.card ≥ 2 := h4
          have h10 : p₁ ∈ S := hp₁
          have h11 : S.card > 1 := by linarith
          have h12 : ∃ p₃ ∈ S, p₃ ≠ p₁ := by
            have h13 : S.card ≥ 2 := h4
            have h14 : p₁ ∈ S := hp₁
            have h15 : S.card > 1 := by linarith
            have h16 : ∃ p₃ ∈ S, p₃ ≠ p₁ := by
              have h17 : S.card > 1 := h15
              have h18 : p₁ ∈ S := hp₁
              have h19 : ∃ p₃ ∈ S, p₃ ≠ p₁ := by
                apply Finset.exists_mem_ne hp₁
                all_goals linarith
              exact h19
            exact h16
          rcases h12 with ⟨p₃, hp₃, hp₃ne⟩
          use p₃
          all_goals tauto
        · -- If p₂ ≠ p₁, then we have two distinct points
          use p₂
          all_goals tauto
      exact h7
    rcases h3 with ⟨p₂, hp₂, hp₁₂⟩
    use (AffineSubspace.bisector p₁ p₂)
    constructor
    · -- Show that the direction of the line is 1-dimensional
      simp [AffineSubspace.finrank_bisector]
    constructor
    · -- Show that there are two points p₁, p₂ in S on opposite sides of l
      refine ⟨p₁, p₂, hp₁, hp₂, ?_⟩
      simp [AffineSubspace.SOppSide, AffineSubspace.bisector]
    · -- Show that all points in S are at least c * n ^ (-1/3) away from l
      intro p hp
      simp [Metric.infDist, AffineSubspace.mem_univ]
      all_goals
        try { 
          have h5 : n ≥ 2 := by linarith
          have h6 : (n : ℝ) ≥ (2 : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast h5
          have h7 : (n : ℝ) ^ (-1 / 3 : ℝ) > 0 := by positivity
          nlinarith [h7]
        }
        try { 
          exfalso
          all_goals tauto
        }
